name: MAX6675 Thermocouple-to-Digital Converter
description: Maxim MAX6675 cold-junction-compensated K-thermocouple to digital converter, 12-bit SPI read-only, 3.0-5.5V, SOIC-8. The entry-level thermocouple interface on K-type breakouts (MAX31855 is 3.3V-only, not a drop-in).
dimensions_source: Maxim MAX6675 datasheet 19-2235 p.8: SOIC .150 (MS012-A) body 4.9x3.9, span 6.0, pitch 1.27. Land pads 0.61x1.6 rows 5.4 c-c per IPC-7351. Pinout p.1.
